headline: Manager Says 'We're Like A Family' Then Forgets Employee's Name For 3 Months
summary: He has called her 'sweetie,' 'kiddo,' and 'the one with the hair' before finally learning 'Jessica.'
fullBody: Jessica Nameberg has worked at her job for 12 weeks. Her manager, Dave 'Family' Thompson, still calls her 'hey you.' 'We're a close-knit team,' Thompson said during a meeting, gesturing vaguely in Jessica's direction. He has tried 'Jennifer,' 'Stephanie,' and once just pointed and said 'the one who does the... thing.' Jessica has started wearing a name tag. Dave still calls her 'tag girl.'
